# PDF Fixtures

These fixtures are native-text PDFs used for deterministic PDF search and highlight tests.

| File | Page | Query/Phrase |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `simple-text.pdf` | 1 | `machine` |
| `split-runs.pdf` | 1 | `tax machine` |
| `phrase-across-runs.pdf` | 1 | `tax machine` |
| `multi-line-phrase.pdf` | 1 | `tax machine` |
| `repeated-word.pdf` | 1 | `machine` |

They intentionally do not cover scanned PDFs, OCR, embeddings, semantic search, or AI behavior.
